scope.boundary_statement: This package describes ASH Cosmology research content only. Storage and implementation decisions are intentionally out of scope.

locked_principle: ASH is finite where it commits and infinite where it explores.
corrected_cosmology_formula: ASH Cosmology = finite local Enneahcube state kernel + recursive leaf-branch universe + branch measure/amplitude/score law + commitment/observation rule + physical bridge to spacetime and observables.

primary_object.formal: 𝔄 = (Ω, C, D, Γ, 𝒯, μ_or_ψ, 𝒞, 𝓜, ℬ_ℓ)

components.name: decoder/defect policy
components.role: correct single-bit codeword errors and reject ambiguous defects

components.name: causal graph/admissible event substrate
components.role: supports local state assignments and branch histories
components.nature: finite per model instance, scalable/emergent in theory

components.name: branch tree/forest
components.role: unbounded family of admissible ASH universe histories

components.name: branch measure or amplitude law
components.role: assigns probability-like weight or complex amplitude to leaves

components.name: commitment/observation/decoherence rule
components.role: relates observer records to leaves without necessarily deleting other leaves

components.name: committed memory/history graph
components.role: realized observer-relative record embedded in branch history

components.name: physical bridge map
components.role: maps branch ensembles to spacetime, fields, entropy, and observables at scale ℓ

model_layers.description: Enneahcube state, parity/integrity coordinate, [9,4,4] code, decoder, defect policy.
model_layers.cosmological_role: local alphabet and admissibility constraints, not the whole universe

model_layers.description: Unbounded recursive tree/forest of admissible universe histories and leaves.
model_layers.cosmological_role: many-worlds / possible-history structure and candidate source of statistical observables

model_layers.description: Observer-relative realized memory path embedded in the full branch field.
model_layers.cosmological_role: explains experienced history without necessarily deleting other branches

model_layers.description: Maps branch ensemble plus local state structure to effective geometry, matter, entropy, and data observables.
model_layers.cosmological_role: turns ASH from information architecture into physical cosmology

ontic_nonquantum.branches: physically real histories with non-quantum measure

quantum_everett.branches: decohered components of a universal state
requirements: Born rule or replacement frequency theorem

preferred_research_target: quantum_everett_or_explicit_ontic_nonquantum; branch status must be chosen before empirical claims are made
one_line_roadmap: Enneahcube local states → admissible branch histories → branch measure/amplitude law → decoherence and observer-relative commitment → branch-ensemble geometry → cosmological observables → empirical tests.
